// Generated by Capy — do not edit. Source: server.capy
package main

import (
    "encoding/json"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "sync"

    "github.com/gorilla/websocket"
)

var upgrader = websocket.Upgrader{
    CheckOrigin: func(r *http.Request) bool { return true },
}

// Envelope carries the discriminated message type on the wire.
type Envelope struct {
    Type string          `json:"type"`
    Data json.RawMessage `json:"data"`
}

type ChatMsg struct {
    User string `json:"user"`
    Text string `json:"text"`
}

type JoinMsg struct {
    User string `json:"user"`
}

// Hub broadcasts messages to all connected clients.
type Hub struct {
    mu      sync.RWMutex
    clients map[*websocket.Conn]struct{}
}

func newHub() *Hub { return &Hub{clients: map[*websocket.Conn]struct{}{}} }

func (h *Hub) Add(c *websocket.Conn)    { h.mu.Lock(); h.clients[c] = struct{}{}; h.mu.Unlock() }
func (h *Hub) Remove(c *websocket.Conn) { h.mu.Lock(); delete(h.clients, c); h.mu.Unlock() }

func (h *Hub) Broadcast(typ string, v any) {
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(v)
    env := Envelope{Type: typ, Data: payload}
    out, _ := json.Marshal(env)
    h.mu.RLock()
    defer h.mu.RUnlock()
    for c := range h.clients {
        _ = c.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, out)
    }
}

func wsHandler(hub *Hub) http.HandlerFunc {
    return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
        conn, err := upgrader.Upgrade(w, r, nil)
        if err != nil { log.Println("upgrade:", err); return }
        hub.Add(conn)
        defer hub.Remove(conn)
        defer conn.Close()
        for {
            _, raw, err := conn.ReadMessage()
            if err != nil { return }
            var env Envelope
            if err := json.Unmarshal(raw, &env); err != nil {
                log.Println("bad envelope:", err); continue
            }
            switch env.Type {
            case "chat":
                var m ChatMsg
                if err := json.Unmarshal(env.Data, &m); err != nil { log.Println("decode:", err); continue }
                // verb=broadcast → echo to all clients.
                hub.Broadcast("chat", m)
            case "join":
                var m JoinMsg
                if err := json.Unmarshal(env.Data, &m); err != nil { log.Println("decode:", err); continue }
                // verb=announce → log + broadcast.
                log.Printf("join: %+v", m)
                hub.Broadcast("join", m)
            default:
                log.Println("unknown message type:", env.Type)
            }
        }
    }
}

func main() {
    hub := newHub()
    http.HandleFunc("/chat", wsHandler(hub))
    addr := ":" + "8080"
    log.Println("ws server listening on", addr+"/chat")
    log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(addr, nil))
}
